blocker.summary: Canonical HoloChat constitution and Gov doctrine hardcoded Randall in universal prompt law.
blocker.why_serious: The constitutional text is injected into worker and Gov prompts each turn. A named feedback user in canonical law conflicts with HoloChat's universal product requirement.

repair_summary: Changed canonical constitutional tone law from Randall-specific language to universal user/person language.
Changed Gov doctrine from Randall-specific respect/prosecution language to universal user language.

Changed built-in HoloChat recovery pack from randall_continuity to user_voice_continuity, explicitly requiring capsule/HoloBrain-owned user-specific anchors rather than hardcoded feedback-user behavior.
Added tests proving active constitution, worker prompt, Gov prompt, Gov doctrine, and built-in recovery pack contain no Randall or Taylor names.
Preserved Randall/Taylor only in tests and capsule/user-memory fixtures.

explicit_non_scope.reason: QA noted multi-call GovAdvisor plan as separate Architecture/build work. This repair is limited to the universal constitution blocker.
